# China A-shares (Shanghai .SS + Shenzhen .SZ) — liquid CSI 300 / CSI 500 core
# Symbols carry their own .SS/.SZ suffix; loaded with NO auto-suffix.
# Suffix rule: 600/601/603/605/688 -> .SS,  000/001/002/300/301 -> .SZ
# Dead/illiquid symbols are pruned automatically by the download validator.
